rag_no_rag_summary: Primary caregivers, regardless of gender, receive **26 weeks of fully paid parental leave**, while secondary caregivers receive **2 weeks of fully paid leave**. All parental leave must be taken within **12 months** of the child's birth or adoption.
rag_grounded_summary:
According to the Samsung India People Policy Handbook (2025 revision), Section 4.2 – Parental Leave:

Primary caregivers (regardless of gender) are entitled to 26 weeks of fully paid parental leave.
Secondary caregivers are entitled to 2 weeks of fully paid parental leave.
The leave must be taken within 12 months of the child's birth or adoption.

So yes, the entitlement differs by caregiver role:

Primary caregiver: 26 weeks
Secondary caregiver: 2 weeks
